transition_log.note: Resolved 4 open cross-domain decisions in decisions.md: (1) DB topology = one shared SQLite file with registry_/tool_/provider_/policy_ prefixes, one handle, no ATTACH, no cross-package FK (DAG-neutral baseline that agent-compiler already assumes); (2) context-condition eval = ALL matching included with deterministic total order (position, version, slug), is_required unmatched => error; (3) keep both context_condition + context_rules with a single shared predicate evaluator + additive union (junction wins dedup); (4) version pin is per-reference (slug, version_pin?), null=latest-at-resolve, identical at junction/policy/experiment sites. Architecture guard passes 3/3 (exit 0). No decision changes the DAG.

Created @adhd/agent-registry package skeleton at packages/ai/agent-registry/. Files: project.json (Nx name agent-registry, tags layer:ai+platform:node, @nx/js:tsc build with drizzle asset glob, release block), package.json (name @adhd/agent-registry, deps drizzle-orm@0.45.2, better-sqlite3@12.10.0, zod@4.4.3 matching agent-mcp versions), tsconfig.json + tsconfig.lib.json (mirroring agent-mcp, ESNext/ES2022/Bundler moduleResolution), src/db/client.ts (better-sqlite3 WAL, reads REGISTRY_DATABASE_PATH|DATABASE_PATH, Decision 1 shared-file comment), src/db/schema.ts (drizzle-orm/sqlite-core imports, no tables yet, per-state comments), src/index.ts (barrel: client + schema re-exports). tsconfig.base.json: added single @adhd/agent-registry line only. nx build agent-registry passed exit 0.

dod_provenance.note: DoD derived from docs/plan/agent-registry/{GOAL,SCOPE,DATA_MODEL,SEED_DATA}.md; confirmed by team-lead via plan-authoring task 2026-06-22
